mapper.sql: session_id, uid, title, preview, message_count, status, summary_status, summary_generated_at, summary_retry_count, summary_error, summary_attempted_at, pinned, pinned_at, created_at, updated_at, archived_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM chat_session WHERE status = 'archived' AND archived_at IS NOT NULL AND archived_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY archived_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET title = #{title}, summary_status = 'done', summary_generated_at = #{generatedAt}, summary_retry_count = 0, summary_error = NULL WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND summary_status = 'processing'
UPDATE chat_session SET summary_status = 'pending', summary_error = NULL WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND summary_status = 'processing'
UPDATE chat_session SET summary_status = 'pending', summary_error = NULL WHERE summary_status = 'processing' AND summary_attempted_at IS NOT NULL AND summary_attempted_at < #{stuckBefore}
